cases.name: gold
cases.diff:
diff --git a/txn/__init__.py b/txn/__init__.py
index 167a6ff..2a2b322 100644
--- a/txn/__init__.py
+++ b/txn/__init__.py
@@ -13,3 +13,13 @@ class DB:
 
     def rollback(self):
         self.log.append("rollback")
+
+def run_in_transaction(db, fn):
+    db.begin()
+    try:
+        result = fn()
+    except Exception:
+        db.rollback()
+        raise
+    db.commit()
+    return result

cases.name: no_rollback
cases.diff:
diff --git a/txn/__init__.py b/txn/__init__.py
index 167a6ff..5f75d96 100644
--- a/txn/__init__.py
+++ b/txn/__init__.py
@@ -13,3 +13,9 @@ class DB:
 
     def rollback(self):
         self.log.append("rollback")
+
+def run_in_transaction(db, fn):
+    db.begin()
+    result = fn()
+    db.commit()
+    return result

cases.name: commit_in_finally
cases.diff:
diff --git a/txn/__init__.py b/txn/__init__.py
index 167a6ff..b577782 100644
--- a/txn/__init__.py
+++ b/txn/__init__.py
@@ -13,3 +13,10 @@ class DB:
 
     def rollback(self):
         self.log.append("rollback")
+
+def run_in_transaction(db, fn):
+    db.begin()
+    try:
+        return fn()
+    finally:
+        db.commit()

cases.name: swallows_error
cases.diff:
diff --git a/txn/__init__.py b/txn/__init__.py
index 167a6ff..815a975 100644
--- a/txn/__init__.py
+++ b/txn/__init__.py
@@ -13,3 +13,13 @@ class DB:
 
     def rollback(self):
         self.log.append("rollback")
+
+def run_in_transaction(db, fn):
+    db.begin()
+    try:
+        result = fn()
+        db.commit()
+        return result
+    except Exception:
+        db.rollback()
+        return None
